body:
With the release of ClimaCalibrate v0.3, this PR updates the calibration pipeline to use the latest release.

This PR also removes the subseasonal calibration pipeline which is not being used right now (and ClimaCalibrate v0.3 paves a way for supporting a subseasonal calibration by allowing for more code reuse via the `AbstractModelInterface` type) and update the documentation.

TODO

- [x] Release ClimaCalibrate v0.3
- [x] Wait for other package updates (e.g. ClimaAtmos, ClimaLand, etc.)
title: Update calibration pipeline to use ClimaCalibrate v0.3
